project_type: Expo React Native mobile app with TypeScript
build_system: npm + expo, no native build tooling required for this task
test_framework: Playwright E2E + fake server, no unit tests. CI gates: lint, typecheck, fake-server self-test, Playwright flows, Android build
test_command: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run typecheck to confirm no TS errors. 2. Run npm run lint to confirm no lint errors.
environment_constraints: No native build available (no Android Studio / Xcode). Playwright E2E requires expo web build + serve. TypeScript typecheck and lint are the primary CI-static checks.
contribution_requirements: Push directly to main after validation. Branch name: gate/ax10-wizard-pricing.
key_patterns: Wizard lives in app/(tabs)/wizard.tsx. Scoring logic in lib/wizard/scoring.ts imports CONNECTORS from lib/wizard/connectors.ts. Uses react-native-paper for UI components (TextInput, Card, Chip, SegmentedButtons, Surface, Text). Colors from @/constants/theme. Path alias @/ maps to project root.
directory_structure: app/(tabs)/ - tab screens including wizard.tsx; lib/wizard/ - scoring logic and connector data; constants/ - theme colors; components/ - shared UI components
